full_text:
Fan Pang (Mengbo) 范滂 (孟博)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fan Pang (范滂), styledMengbo (孟博), was born in Runan. One of the Eight Paragons of Jiangxia. Fan Pang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
